stub_declaration.orig_declaration: EXTERN_C_LINKAGE void FrmHdDevMapCancel (const UINT32_T localDevInfo, const UINT32_T otherDevInfo)

EXTERN_C_LINKAGE void RelieveEbReason (const UINT8_T ebType, const UINT32_T ebReason)

EXTERN_C_LINKAGE UINT32_T GetCommFailTime (const UINT8_T SendDevType, const UINT8_T RcvDevType)
EXTERN_C_LINKAGE UINT32_T GetHealFailTime (const UINT8_T SendDevType, const UINT8_T RcvDevType)
